title: An insurance company’s internal ombudsman office is not a “formal dispute resolution process” under PIPEDA
summary: The complainant alleged that an insurance company refused to provide her with access to her personal information. The complainant was involved in a dispute over the company’s assessment of her insurance claim, which resulted in her filing a complaint with the company’s ombudsman, who later advised that her dispute could not be resolved.
dedupKey: an insurance company rsquo s internal ombudsman office is not a ldquo formal dispute resolution process rdquo under pipeda|2016-02-12
